chapters.title: Emergency Protocols
chapters.storyPurpose: Alex discovers the extent of system failures and learns the station's container-based architecture from Commander Torres
chapters.learningPurpose: Understanding Kubernetes clusters, nodes, and the basic architecture of container orchestration
chapters.narrativeSetup: Solar storm damage has left multiple station systems offline, and Alex must quickly understand how the station's distributed services work together.
chapters.narrativePayoff: Alex grasps the station's cluster architecture and identifies which nodes are still operational, providing a foundation for the repairs ahead.

chapters.title: Life Support Restoration
chapters.storyPurpose: Alex must restore critical life support services by deploying containerized applications to healthy nodes
chapters.learningPurpose: Creating and deploying pods, understanding pod specifications and basic resource allocation
chapters.docQuery: kubernetes pods deployment create pod spec
chapters.narrativeSetup: With oxygen recycling systems failing, Alex needs to quickly deploy backup life support services to operational nodes.
chapters.narrativePayoff: Life support stabilizes as Alex successfully deploys their first pods, but other critical systems still need attention.

chapters.title: Data Vault Recovery
chapters.storyPurpose: Dr. Tanaka's research data is at risk, requiring Alex to set up persistent storage and data recovery services
chapters.learningPurpose: Working with persistent volumes, storage classes, and data persistence in Kubernetes
chapters.docQuery: kubernetes persistent volumes storage classes data persistence
chapters.narrativeSetup: The research data vault's storage systems are corrupted, and years of atmospheric research could be lost without proper data recovery deployment.
chapters.narrativePayoff: Critical research data is secured with persistent storage, but the communication systems remain down as the supply ship approaches.

chapters.title: Network Isolation Breach
chapters.storyPurpose: System failures are cascading between services, requiring Alex to implement proper service isolation and networking
chapters.learningPurpose: Kubernetes networking, services, and namespace isolation to prevent cascading failures
chapters.narrativeSetup: The cascade failure pattern is spreading between interconnected systems, threatening to bring down recently restored services.
chapters.narrativePayoff: Alex successfully isolates critical services, but the communication array remains offline and the supply ship is losing signal strength.

chapters.title: Communications Array Crisis
chapters.storyPurpose: With the supply ship approaching and guidance systems failing, Alex must orchestrate a complex multi-service deployment under extreme time pressure
chapters.learningPurpose: Advanced deployments, rolling updates, health checks, and service orchestration under constraints
chapters.docQuery: kubernetes deployments rolling updates health checks orchestration
chapters.narrativeSetup: Captain Vasquez reports critical navigation failures as her ship approaches, requiring Alex to coordinate multiple interdependent services simultaneously.
chapters.narrativePayoff: The communication array comes online just as backup power reaches critical levels, but the full station orchestration still needs completion.

chapters.title: Full System Orchestration
chapters.storyPurpose: Alex must coordinate all station systems into a unified, self-healing infrastructure as the supply ship docks and power is restored
chapters.learningPurpose: Complete system orchestration, auto-scaling, load balancing, and creating resilient distributed systems
chapters.docQuery: kubernetes orchestration scaling load balancing resilient systems
chapters.narrativeSetup: With the supply ship successfully guided in and power being restored, Alex must now orchestrate all station systems into a coordinated, fault-tolerant whole.
chapters.narrativePayoff: All station systems operate in perfect harmony, the research mission continues, and Alex has proven themselves as a capable systems orchestrator.

narrativeThread: Alex must progressively master Kubernetes orchestration to save the Kepler Research Station, starting with basic deployments for life support and building toward complex multi-service coordination. Each system restored brings new challenges that require deeper orchestration skills, culminating in managing the entire station's distributed infrastructure. The approaching supply ship and dwindling backup power create mounting pressure that mirrors the increasing technical complexity.
resolutionPlan: The final chapter requires Alex to combine pod deployment skills from life support restoration, persistent storage knowledge from data recovery, networking isolation techniques from preventing cascades, and advanced orchestration from the communications crisis. Alex must create a unified system manifest that coordinates all station services with proper resource allocation, health monitoring, and automatic failover - demonstrating mastery of the complete Kubernetes orchestration lifecycle while resolving the central question of station survival.
